title: Economic sectors
summary: 9609 AS — primary, secondary, tertiary, and quaternary sectors; changing structure of economies.
learningObjectives: Define primary, secondary, tertiary, and quaternary sectors.
Describe sector shift in developed economies.
Explain implications for business location and skills.

simpleExplanation.title: Types of economic activity
simpleExplanation.summary: As economies develop, employment shifts from primary toward tertiary and quaternary activities.

sections.content: **Economic sectors** (1.2.1) underpin **location** and **workforce planning** topics later. Classify **named businesses** into sectors in exam answers.
